title: Fringe Academy How To Market Yourself Social Media Physical Marketing
description: Tom Hooker from Lost Hippo (best known in for award winning Fringe show 'Guess Boo: The Mystery of my Nan's Ashes, Disco of the Damned and Class of 96), is here to talk all about how to market yourself! Tom knows a thing or two about how to self-publicise, market your show and get your face out there. Be sure to come along to get the most out of the number 1 thing in Fringe - you! Tom will cover: Social media posting Paid for ads Building your brand, not just selling tickets Leafleting techniques Gorilla marketing ideas Fringe Academies are free to attend and are designed to help Artists make the most out of their Brighton Fringe experience!
